title: User navigates to the home page
test_steps: Open the healthcare-related mobile application. | Verify that the user is on the home page.
expected_result: The screen displays the status bar, header, profile section, rating prompt, action center, and recent activity.

title: User selects the 'No thanks' button in the rating prompt
test_steps: Open the healthcare-related mobile application. | Navigate to the home page. | Click on the 'No thanks' button in the rating prompt.
expected_result: The rating prompt is dismissed, and the user remains on the home page.

title: User selects the 'Sure' button in the rating prompt
test_steps: Open the healthcare-related mobile application. | Navigate to the home page. | Click on the 'Sure' button in the rating prompt.
expected_result: The rating prompt is dismissed, and the user is prompted to rate the app on Google Play.

title: User navigates to the profile section
test_steps: Open the healthcare-related mobile application. | Navigate to the home page. | Click on the user's name 'Laura Lee' in the header.
expected_result: The user is navigated to the profile page.

title: User attempts to set a mobile passcode
test_steps: Open the healthcare-related mobile application. | Navigate to the home page. | Click on the 'Set a mobile passcode' button in the action center.
expected_result: The user is prompted to set a mobile passcode.

title: User attempts to view unread emails
test_steps: Open the healthcare-related mobile application. | Navigate to the home page. | Click on the 'Unread emails' button in the action center.
expected_result: The user is navigated to the unread emails section.

title: User attempts to view new clinical items
test_steps: Open the healthcare-related mobile application. | Navigate to the home page. | Click on the 'New clinical items' button in the action center.
expected_result: The user is navigated to the new clinical items section.

title: User navigates to the recent activity section
test_steps: Open the healthcare-related mobile application. | Navigate to the home page. | Click on the 'Recent activity' section.
expected_result: The user is navigated to the recent activity section.

title: User attempts to connect a health record
test_steps: Open the healthcare-related mobile application. | Navigate to the home page. | Click on the 'Connect a health record' button in the recent activity section.
expected_result: The user is prompted to connect a health record.
